title: 2026 Women's March Madness Live Updates: Second-Round Scores, Analysis, and Bracket Breakdown with CBS Sports
body:
In a stunning turn of events, the 2026 Women's March Madness tournament continued its thrilling pace on Monday, as the competition reached the second round. The NCAA Tournament field has been trimmed down to 16 teams, each vying for a spot in the coveted Final Four. Among the day's most notable upsets was No. 10 Virginia's double-overtime victory over No. 2 Iowa, a triumph that has catapulted the Cavaliers to the forefront of the tournament.

This Cinderella story has been months in the making for Virginia, and the team's resilience and determination have paid off in spectacular fashion. Led by their star player, the Cavaliers have consistently defied expectations and proved themselves to be a force to be reckoned with. The 83-75 victory over Iowa, which was played out in two thrilling overtimes, showcased the team's unwavering spirit and ability to perform under pressure. With this win, Virginia has not only secured its place in the tournament's next round but also sent shockwaves throughout the competition.

The upset victory over Iowa also highlights the unpredictable nature of Women's March Madness. This tournament has a long history of producing surprises, and Monday's action was no exception. The double-overtime thriller between Virginia and Iowa was a nail-biter from start to finish, with both teams giving it their all in a bid to emerge victorious. In the end, it was Virginia's determination and skill that proved to be the deciding factor, as they outlasted Iowa in a contest that will be remembered for years to come.

As the tournament enters its next phase, it's clear that the competition is heating up. The remaining 16 teams will face off in the Sweet 16 round, with the stakes higher than ever. With top seeds facing stiff challenges from lower-ranked teams, the tension and excitement are building. Fans of Women's March Madness can expect more thrilling matchups and upsets as the tournament progresses.

One of the key storylines emerging from Monday's action is the dominance of Virginia's star player. This talented athlete has been the driving force behind her team's success, and her performance against Iowa was nothing short of phenomenal. As the tournament enters its next phase, fans will be eagerly watching to see how she fares against her next opponent.

As the competition reaches its climax, it's clear that the 2026 Women's March Madness tournament is shaping up to be one for the ages. With its trademark blend of drama, excitement, and unpredictability, this tournament continues to captivate audiences around the world. As the remaining teams battle it out in the Sweet 16 round, fans can expect more thrilling action and surprises. With the Final Four just around the corner, the stakes are higher than ever, and the competition is heating up. One thing is certain: the 2026 Women's March Madness tournament will go down in history as one of the most unforgettable in recent years.
